pi_items.source: Calculated using Shoelace formula on coordinates [[0, 0], [50, 0], [55, 35], [25, 45], [0, 30]]: Area = 2050 sq m
Matches task description (lines 3-7: P1 through P5)
DXF Standard ACI (AutoCAD Color Index): index 1 = Red. Task description (line 1) specifies 'color Red (color index 1)'
DXF Standard ACI (AutoCAD Color Index): index 3 = Green. Task description (line 3) specifies 'color Green (color index 3)'
Task description (lines 4-5): text entities with content 'PARCEL A-2047' and 'AREA: 2050 sq m'. Metadata simplifies to key strings for verification.

privileged_info_summary: The survey_plot_boundary task uses synthetic data: a 5-vertex closed polygon with coordinates (0,0), (50,0), (55,35), (25,45), (0,30) forming an area of 2050 square meters. The task requires creating two DXF layers (PARCEL_BOUNDARY in Red/index 1 and ANNOTATIONS in Green/index 3) with a polyline and two text annotations (PARCEL A-2047 and AREA: 2050 sq m). The output file is saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/survey_plot.dxf. No real survey data or external data sources are used.
